ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISCHANGED(Stage_Status__c) && TEXT(Stage_Status__c) = 'Completed' && TEXT(Stage__c) = 'Possession / Handover' && TEXT(Project_Type__c) = 'Villas' && Panchayati_License_Uploaded__c = false
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please upload the Panchayati License before marking the Possession / Handover stage as completed
